data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for native payment processors (Stripe, Square, PayPal) but did not provide any concrete evidence confirming their integration. The linked use case mentions the need for payment processing via Stripe, but there is no evidence of successful API interactions or state checks that demonstrate this functionality is operational. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for payment processor integration.
gaps: No evidence of successful integration with payment processors (Stripe, Square, PayPal).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for payment processor integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that payment processors (Stripe, Square, PayPal) are integrated and operational.
